metadata.title: Mamari Calendar — Confirmed Glyph-to-Night Mappings
metadata.methodology: Only entries confirmed by master lexicon + calendarbank with stated confidence and tablet attestation

confirmed_high.calendar_role: General moon marker recurring throughout calendar sequence
Night Hua — first quarter moon, approximately night 8
confirmed_high.evidence: Guy 1998; calendarbank; fruit shape consistent with first-quarter metaphor; position in sequence

confirmed_high.meaning: Rakau (tree / wood) — night before full moon
confirmed_high.calendar_role: Night(s) Rakau — penultimate pre-full-moon night(s), approximately nights 11-12
confirmed_high.evidence: Barthel 1958; calendarbank; tree shape; positional evidence immediately before B152

confirmed_high.meaning: Omotohi — 'Old Woman Lighting the Oven in the Sky' / full moon
confirmed_high.calendar_role: Night 15 — FULL MOON. Structural anchor for entire calendar sequence.
confirmed_high.evidence: Barthel 1958; scholarly consensus; central position in sequence; iconographic match (circular disc with interior figure); highest-confidence glyph identification in entire corpus

confirmed_high.meaning: Maure / waning gibbous — first night after full moon
confirmed_high.calendar_role: Night Maure — first waning night, approximately night 16
confirmed_high.evidence: Guy 1998; calendarbank; position immediately following B152 in sequence

confirmed_high.calendar_role: Dark moon / new-moon approach, approximately nights 26-28
confirmed_high.evidence: Metoro reading ('honu'); Barthel 1958; calendarbank (dark moon association); position at end of calendar section

moderate_confidence.meaning: Extinct Easter Island palm (Paschalococos) / cycle / Rongo
moderate_confidence.calendar_role: Possibly marks 'Rongo' waning-half phase — the god Rongo is associated with the moon and agriculture
moderate_confidence.caveat: Cycle meaning plausible but night-specific assignment unconfirmed

moderate_confidence.calendar_role: Possibly night 'Ohiro' (the Hiro night, ~night 14) — Hiro = rain god with lizard association
moderate_confidence.caveat: Night-specific assignment is positional inference; not directly confirmed
Only 1 occurrence in lexicon; no tablet attestation listed; needs more evidence

moderate_confidence.calendar_role: Night Ohotu (sprouting, near dark moon) — candidate only
moderate_confidence.caveat: Low confidence; only 2 occurrences; no tablet attestation
Low confidence; only 2 occurrences; no tablet attestation

unconfirmed_claims.problem: Lexicon: G40 = wavy line = water/sea (vai/tai), conf 0.80. Visual form (wavy line) contradicts 'small vertical stroke' description. Kokore mechanism not confirmed in lexicon data.
Lexicon: G385 = confidence 0.0, no meaning, 0 occurrences. Cannot be used.

orientation_coding.description: Glyphs drawn upright in waxing phase, inverted after full moon (night 15 B152). Documented by Barthel 1958. Visually observable in tablet images.
orientation_coding.specific_glyphs_affected: Not individually confirable at current image resolution — documented in published literature
